sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Game over again after 7 green clicks (1 from previous + 6 more in this batch). The movement between clicks didn't help - still game over after ~8-9 total green clicks.
I've been stuck in a loop. Let me fundamentally reconsider the problem:
1. Level 1: Collect greens, move LEFT toward pink cross, LEFT to complete
2. Level 2: Has greens but no visible pink cross
Maybe the goal isn't to collect all green blocks! Maybe I need to:
- Fill the bottom bar completely (9 purple pixels)
- Then do something else entirely
- Or maybe I need to click the purple blocks themselves in some way
- Or maybe the goal is to get the bar full and then move LEFT/RIGHT to complete
Let me try a completely different approach: fill the bar with all 9 dots, then try LEFT or RIGHT to see if that completes the level without touching green blocks at all.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Game over again after 7 green clicks. Movement between clicks doesn't help.
# Fundamental rethink: maybe the goal isn't to collect green blocks at all!
# New hypothesis: fill the bar with all 9 dots, then LEFT/RIGHT completes level
# Let me try this without touching any green blocks

# First check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
purple = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p']
green = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Purple blocks: {len(purple)}, Green blocks: {len(green)}")

# Check bottom bar state
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] < 10 and n['color'] in ['p', 'w', 'W']:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(x[0] for x in b)
        if min_r > 50:
            print(f"Bottom bar object: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, min_r={min_r}")

# Try filling bar with all 9 dots, then LEFT to complete
# Dots are at row 11, cols 14, 16, 18, 20, 22, 24, 26, 28, 30 (approx)
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 11, 'col': 14},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 11, 'col': 16},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 11, 'col': 18},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 11, 'col': 20},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 11, 'col': 22},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 11, 'col': 24},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 11, 'col': 26},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 11, 'col': 28},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 11, 'col': 30},
    'LEFT'
])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"ACTION7": "Invalid", "LEFT": "Moves player left ~6 columns", "MOUSE": "Clicks objects. Green blocks: game over after 8-9. Dots/purple: adds to bar.", "RIGHT": "Moves player right ~6 columns"}, "cross_level_notes": "HYPOTHESIS: Level 2 goal is to fill bar then LEFT, not collect greens", "hud_map": {"bottom_bar": "purple+white at row 63"}, "level_log": {"level2": "All green collection attempts fail. Trying bar-fill + LEFT approach"}, "win_pattern": {"level1": "Collect green blocks, move LEFT toward pink cross", "level2_hypothesis": "Fill bar with 9 dots, then LEFT to complete"}}, "level_tier": {"current_plan": "Fill bar with 9 dot clicks, then LEFT to test if level completes", "failed_probes": ["All green collection strategies: game over after 8-9 clicks"], "goal_model": "Fill bar completely, then LEFT to complete level", "recent_findings": ["Movement between green clicks does NOT prevent game over VERIFIED(step 135)"], "world_model": "Level 2 reset after game over. Testing completely new hypothesis."}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
